evals.prompt: Export my usage from OpenCode and analyze the costs
evals.expected_output: Agent prompts user for source selection, runs export_usage.py --source opencode, then analyze_costs.py, and presents a cost breakdown.
expectations: Agent asks which LLM surface to extract from
A usage.json file is produced with timestamp, model_id, input_tokens, output_tokens fields
Agent runs scripts/analyze_costs.py on the exported usage
Agent presents a per-model cost breakdown
